name: When should I not use FAQ schema for AEO?
description: Do not use it on thin, generic, or hidden content. Add it only when the page has real, visible Q&A value.

mainEntity.name: When should I not use FAQ schema for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: If the page is about a service, add FAQ schema only for questions that support the buying decision. If the page is about a guide, use FAQ schema when the questions clarify common confusion. If the page is thin or generic, start by improving the content before adding markup.
acceptedAnswer.description: Do not use it on thin, generic, or hidden content. Add it only when the page has real, visible Q&A value.
